steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: Left of the blank is a verb phrase with its direct object (“examines themes”). Right of the blank is a compound noun phrase listing three nouns (“childhood, womanhood, and Chinese American identity”). The blank must connect the object to the nouns that elaborate what the themes are.

steps.title: Apply the preposition rule
steps.content:
A preposition introduces its object noun phrase directly—no punctuation is placed between a preposition and what it modifies.

The preposition “of” must connect directly to the noun list; inserting a colon, em dash, or comma between the preposition and its object violates standard usage.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
